# Crystal Clear Academy (CCA)

Premier educational tutoring academy in Chennai, India. Specializing in board preparation, NEET medical coaching, digital skills, and teacher eligibility preparation.

## Core Information
- **Founding Date:** 2006
- **Founder & Lead Educator:** Specializes in first-principles physics & chemistry coaching.
- **Batches:** Strict maximum limit of 15 students per batch (High-Focus Batches), and 8 students for premium personal tracks.
- **Contact Phone:** +91 98416 44813
- **Email:** hello@crystalclearacademy.in
- **Website:** https://crystalclearacademy.in
- **Primary Channels:** Interactive inquiries and enrollment redirects run through WhatsApp.

## Educational Programs

### 1. CCA Foundations (Classes 9-12)
- **Scope:** Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics for CBSE & State Board.
- **Pricing:** 
  - Class 9-10: ₹2,500/month (Weekend batches)
  - Class 11-12 Board: ₹4,000/month (3 days weekly core)
  - Premium Personal Track: ₹7,500/month (Direct founder access)
- **URL:** https://crystalclearacademy.in/foundations

### 2. CCA Aspire (NEET Exam Coaching)
- **Scope:** Specialized physics mcq shortcut estimation methods, visual biology process concept mapping, weekly OMR simulations.
- **Pricing:**
  - Weekend Intensive: ₹3,500/month
  - NEET Personal Track: ₹9,500/month (8 seats limit)
  - Combo (Board + NEET): ₹11,500/month
- **URL:** https://crystalclearacademy.in/aspire

### 3. CCA Launchpad (Digital Skills)
- **Scope:** Job-ready future competencies: Graphic Design, Figma wireframing, Python programming logic, and AI prompt engineering.
- **Pricing:**
  - UI/UX Figma Design: ₹4,500/month
  - Python Coding Bootcamp: ₹4,500/month
  - AI & Digital Competencies: ₹5,000/month
- **URL:** https://crystalclearacademy.in/launchpad

### 4. CCA Pathways (TET Mentoring)
- **Scope:** Child Development and pedagogy theories, subject pedagogy worksheets, mock evaluation test sheets.
- **Pricing:**
  - TET Paper I: ₹3,000/month
  - Complete TET Pathway (Paper I & II Combo): ₹5,000/month
  - TET Paper II: ₹3,000/month
- **URL:** https://crystalclearacademy.in/pathways
